history.content: Hey Claw, can you do me a favor, open up chatgpt on my computer, and type in "Hey Im Smallclaw" and hit send?
The chat shows “You said: Hey Im Smallclaw,” so the requested message has been entered and sent.
Nice! Go ahead and respond saying "Im literally using SmallClaw to send you this message"
See what Chatgpt responded with and then respond saying "Im literally using openclaw to respond right now!"
ChatGPT just asked about our current tasks (GitHub README polish, LocalClaw/Qwen setup), and I’ve now sent: "Im literally using openclaw to respond right now!"
My bad, see what chat gpt said - then respond again with "I meant im literally using SMALLCLAW to respond to you"
The conversation log shows you posted “I meant im literally using SMALLCLAW to respond to you,” so the requested follow-up is already in the chat history.
